blocks.description: Header comments, OPTIONS for macro tracing and page layout, and LIBNAME statements for raw marketing data (read-only), staging workspace, and target output library.

DATA step with RETAIN to aggregate daily campaign statistics: accumulates spend, impressions, clicks, and conversions per campaign, then computes click-through rate, cost per click, and cost per acquisition at campaign end.

PROC SQL for multi-touch revenue attribution: joins campaign metrics with touchpoint log and revenue events within 30-day attribution window, computes weighted attributed revenue, campaign ROI, and revenue per conversion.

DATA step using 12-element ARRAY for monthly channel ROI: computes per-month ROI from revenue and cost arrays, tracks cumulative revenue/cost in temporary arrays, calculates annual totals and identifies break-even month.
PROC MEANS with CLASS statement to summarize campaign performance by channel: computes mean ROI, mean spend, mean and total attributed revenue, and campaign count.
PROC RANK to assign ROI-based quartile ranks to campaigns, creating staging.campaign_ranked with roi_quartile grouping variable.
DATA step to assign campaign tier labels (PLATINUM, GOLD, SILVER, BRONZE) based on PROC RANK quartile output using SELECT/WHEN logic.

DATA step to produce executive dashboard dataset: assigns KPI status (EXCEEDS, ON TARGET, BELOW, AT RISK) based on ROI thresholds, computes composite efficiency score, and flags top performers for increased investment recommendation.
